meta.title: Available Source-Def Kinds
meta.desc: Reference card listing all source-def kinds supported by the task executor, with required fields and usage notes.

card_data.summary: This board's task executor supports 5 source-def kinds. Each source_def entry requires `bindTo` (string) and `outputFile` (string). The kind-specific key (e.g. `url`, `copilot`, `teams`) determines how data is fetched.

kinds_table.description: Single URL fetch with {{key}} interpolation. Supports caching.
kinds_table.notes: Optional: url.method, url.headers, url.args, url.cacheTimeout, tickersFrom.

kinds_table.description: Fan-out over a pre-resolved URL list from _projections.url_list.
kinds_table.notes: Declare projections.url_list with JSONata producing string[].

kinds_table.description: Invoke GitHub Copilot CLI with an interpolated prompt template.
Query Microsoft 365 Copilot with an interpolated query.
Microsoft Graph Teams API via Zoltbook CLI.
kinds_table.notes: Requires az login + Python 3. Optional: team_id, channel_id, top, content, query, etc.

common_source_def_fields.bindTo: Namespace key — result lands in fetched_sources.<bindTo>
common_source_def_fields.outputFile: Board-relative path the executor writes result to
common_source_def_fields.projections: Object of JSONata expressions pre-computing _projections from requires data
common_source_def_fields.optionalForCompletionGating: If true, card completes even if this source fails (default: false)
